Two issues should be addressed before final acceptance: (1) an internal inconsistency flagged by the verifier where the deterministic precheck says semantic correctness was not evaluated but later outputs assert semantic scores of 1.0; (2) limited machine-verifiability because openpyxl was unavailable and the workbook lacks explicit sheet/cell provenance and explicit +/-5% scenario cell links.
label: positive
